name: @xi-io/gmail-metadata-adapter
description: Local Gmail metadata-only adapter (GMAIL-001C). No send, no bodies, no localStorage tokens.

scripts.check: node scripts/ensure-deps.mjs && node --check lib/response.js && node --check lib/token-store.js && node --check lib/receipts.js && node --check lib/oauth-loopback.js && node --check lib/body-gate.js && node --check lib/body-redaction.js && node --check lib/body-snapshot-schema.js && node --check lib/local-data.js && node --check lib/snapshot-schema.js && node --check lib/adapter.js && node --check cli.js && node test/metadata-guards.mjs && node test/oauth-hardening.mjs && node test/wipe-local-data.mjs && node test/body-gate.mjs && node test/hardening.mjs
